headline: ₹50-200 Cr at risk if future disclosure lapses trigger fund outflows or cost of capital increases — Adani Power flagged for market attention amid ESG disclosure focus; limited immediate business impact expected
what_matters: No P/E compression or margin erosion; revenue at risk is negligible.
BRSR [MANDATORY], GRI, ESRS triggered; no deadlines or penalties currently active.
Marginal risk of higher cost of capital (+20-40bps) if disclosure lags persist, but no current outflow.
